title: Department for Business and Trade annual report and accounts for 2023 to 2024
body: "DBT’s annual report and accounts set out the main activities undertaken by the department and how it has delivered against its core objectives.  The report includes detailed information about the department’s governance arrangements and a full set of audited financial statements that have been prepared in line with HM Treasury’s Government Financial Reporting Manual (FReM).  DBT is responsible for the maintenance of, and controls underpinning, this webpage upon which the online version of the annual report and accounts is being published electronically.  "
